question.label: Team response to refactor
question.name: How do you feel the team has responded to the payments refactor?
question.description: Investigates perceptions of team dynamics and recognition of contributions.

answer: I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.

assessment.note: Mentoring interest is not being pursued, indicating a strong disengagement signal while also highlighting a desire for growth opportunities.

new_queue.label: Mental space for growth
new_queue.name: Do you feel you have the bandwidth right now to take on mentoring responsibilities?

new_queue.label: Upcoming projects
new_queue.name: What are your initial thoughts about getting involved in the billing rewrite?

new_queue.label: Blockers insight
new_queue.name: Are there any current tasks where you're facing unexpected challenges?

new_queue.label: Future clarity
new_queue.name: What would help you feel more prepared for the upcoming billing rewrite?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
